data.title: Shiba Inu Might Be ‘Dead And Sleeping’, But Not For Long, Crypto Expert Says
data.description:
Shiba Inu (SHIB) continues to trade in a tight band, and that has kept many investors on edge. Based on reports, the token is down 45% year-to-date and 15% over the last 30 days. Related Reading: 16,000 Ancient Bitcoins Just Moved—And It’s Costing Whales Billions The memecoin’s price action has left holders wondering when — or if — a strong rebound will arrive. Volume and price swings have cooled, and market mood is leaning toward fear with the Fear & Greed Index at 30
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/shiba-inu-might-be-dead-and-sleeping-but-not-for-long-crypto-expert-says/

data.title: The "100% Winning Whale" has increased its long position value to $270 million, with a floating loss of $384,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the "mysterious whale with a 100% win rate" has surpassed the size of its ETH long positions: BTC long position: 1,309.31 BTC, valued at $144 million, opened at $110,592.3; ETH long position: 33,270.78 ETH, valued at $129 million, opened at $3,897.59. The total position has reached $274 million, and has turned from profit to loss, with a floating loss of $384,000. In addition, there are 64.95 BTC in pending orders that have not been executed.

data.title: Bitget Wallet announces support for the x402 protocol
data.description: Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced its upcoming support for the x402 protocol to further explore and enhance the Web3 payment experience. This integration will enable users to initiate on-chain payments by scanning a QR code or clicking a link, providing a smoother and more natural on-chain payment experience. Bitget Wallet has been continuously expanding its presence in the Web3 payments space, launching a crypto payment card to promote the real-world use of crypto assets; launching a QR code payment feature for Vietnam, allowing users to directly scan and pay with crypto assets like USDT at local merchants; and integrating Solana Pay, bringing a native low-latency payment experience to the Solana ecosystem.

data.title: Fetch.ai and Ocean Protocol move toward resolving $120M FET dispute
data.description:
Fetch. ai and Ocean Protocol appear close to resolving their dispute over 286M FET tokens, following comments made during an X Space. Markets remain cautious.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/fetch-ai-and-ocean-protocol-move-toward-resolving-120m-fet-dispute/

data.title: Ripple completes acquisition of Hidden Road, which has been renamed Ripple Prime
data.description: Ripple announced the completion of its acquisition of Hidden Road, now rebranded as Ripple Prime. Hidden Road previously provided institutions with clearing, prime brokerage, and foreign exchange (FX), digital assets, derivatives, swaps, and fixed income financing services. This acquisition will establish Ripple as the first cryptocurrency company to own and operate a global, multi-asset prime broker. Since the acquisition announcement, Ripple Prime has seen a threefold increase in business and expects further growth. Ripple Prime will enhance the utility and reach of Ripple's stablecoin, RLUSD. RLUSD is currently used as collateral for various prime brokerage products, and some derivatives clients have already chosen to hold RLUSD.

data.title: Tether Projects $15 Billion Profit with High Margin in 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has announced that the USDT issuer anticipates a profit of $15 billion this year. The company expects to achieve a profit margin of 99%.

data.title: Gemini's Rating Downgraded by Citi Amid Bullish's Positive Outlook
data.description: According to Foresight News, CoinDesk reports that Citi has downgraded Gemini's rating to neutral while raising Bullish's rating to buy. Citi's analyst team noted that Gemini's trading growth is expected to take longer despite strong credit card sign-ups and app downloads in October, as trading volumes remain below expectations. Meanwhile, Bullish's approval for a New York BitLicense and expanded institutional access indicate strong growth momentum.

data.title: The "Mysterious Whale with 100% Win Rate" continued to increase its holdings by 98.61 BTC and placed a buy order for 124.34 BTC at $110,500.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi’s monitoring, the “mysterious whale with 100% winning rate” continued to increase his holdings by 98.61 BTC when the price fell, and also placed a buy order for 124.34 BTC at $110,500. His profit has now retreated to $785,000.

data.title: Zelle weighs stablecoin integration to expand its trillion-dollar payments network abroad
data.description:
Early Warning Services, which operates Zelle, has launched an initiative designed to explore international transfers using stablecoin technology.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/376092/zelle-weighs-stablecoin-integration-expand-trillion-dollar-payments-network-abroad?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: pump.fun acquires trading terminal Padre; PADRE tokens will no longer be used on the platform
data.description: pump.fun announced the acquisition of trading terminal Padre for an undisclosed amount. The announcement stated that following the acquisition, Padre will continue to operate as usual, including token trading on every launchpad and decentralized exchange on Solana, BNB Chain, Ethereum L1, and Base. The PADRE token will no longer be used on the platform, and there are no further plans for its future use. pump.fun stated that the acquisition will enhance the pump.fun user experience.

data.title: AI predicts Bitcoin price for Halloween 2025
data.description:
So far, “Uptober” has not been living up to its name this year, and Finbold’s AI prediction agent suggests that Bitcoin (BTC) is likely to slip even further by Halloween. The crypto is currently trading at around $111,280, having suffered a monthly drop of 1.48% as a result of mounting selling pressure and weakening institutional flows.  BTC 1-month price chart
source: https://finbold.com/ai-predicts-bitcoin-price-for-halloween-2025/

data.title: After Binance Wallet added the "x402" listing to its market section, PING's market capitalization surged past $42 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, PING’s price surged past a market capitalization of $42 million, with a short-term increase of over 20%, influenced by the addition of the “x402” listing in the Binance Wallet market section.

data.title: U.S. Government Transfers Seized OCEAN Tokens
data.description: According to Foresight News, the U.S. government has recently transferred OCEAN tokens valued at $36, which were confiscated from Alameda two years ago. The movement of these digital assets was detected by Arkham, a blockchain monitoring service. This transfer marks a significant development in the handling of seized cryptocurrency assets by the authorities.
